name: Canaan
oracleText:
Menace
Whenever a creature an opponent controls becomes tapped, that player loses 1 life.
Whenever an opponent loses life during your turn, Canaan gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
flavorText: "Cursed be Canaan; a servant of servants shall he be unto his brethren." — Genesis 9:25
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the Wikimedia Commons file "Drunkenness of Noah" for Canaan's old-master treatment.
title: Heir of the Curse
